hero.name: TAHA EL BAH
hero.tagline: Building APIs that scale. Systems that last.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: Full-stack software engineer building production applications with React, Spring Boot, NestJS, Laravel and PostgreSQL. I've shipped web platforms, AI-powered systems and scalable backend APIs — 25+ production REST APIs, endpoints tuned to sub-200ms — and owned them across development, deployment and maintenance.

projects.title: What I've Built
projects.project1Desc: Production backend powering a service marketplace. 25+ versioned REST APIs, JWT + role-based auth (client/provider/admin), p95 latency under 200ms.
projects.project2Desc: ML-based recommendation engine driven by real-time market data. Python prediction-pipeline backend with an exposed API, and a React dashboard for visualising trading insights.
projects.project3Desc: Full-stack e-commerce platform with a custom admin dashboard for products, orders and users. Integrated the WooCommerce REST API for real-time catalogue, order and inventory sync; scalable backend and schema, deployed on Hostinger with CI/CD.
projects.project5Desc: Four-service NestJS microservices backend with JWT/RBAC auth, Redis caching and AWS S3 (p95 < 200ms). A Python FastAPI matching service uses Sentence Transformers for semantic resume–job ranking. Next.js frontend, with automated AWS EC2 deployment via GitHub Actions CI/CD.

experience.title: My Journey
experience.job1Bullet1: Developed and deployed full-stack apps with React, Flutter, Electron, PHP & SQL
experience.job1Bullet2: Built frontend features, backend APIs and scalable database systems for clients
experience.job1Bullet3: Managed deployment, bug fixes and production support on cloud infrastructure
experience.job2Bullet1: Built a full-stack marketplace (Spring Boot, React, PostgreSQL) with JWT/RBAC auth & 25+ REST APIs
experience.job2Bullet2: Improved backend performance (p95 < 200ms); delivered features end-to-end, database to UI
experience.job3Bullet1: Shipped Java + React features across 2 release cycles in 6 weeks
experience.job3Bullet2: Resolved 15+ code-quality issues through peer reviews
experience.job4Bullet1: Fine-tuned classification models (Python, TensorFlow, scikit-learn): 89% accuracy (+7 pts over baseline)
experience.job5Bullet1: Maintained enterprise Java apps; optimised slow SQL queries, cutting report generation time by ~30%
experience.job6Bullet1: Built an Employee Management System (Java, Spring Boot, MySQL) handling 200+ records
experience.job6Bullet2: Introduced Agile sprint cadence to the intern team
experience.job7Bullet1: Secondary field: Data Analytics · English-taught · IELTS C1
